title: El Viaje de Pepito
subtitle: Pepito travels through town discovering vehicles
learningObjectives: Practice vehicle sounds and movement verbs
Introduce question formation (¿Cuál es tu favorito?)

seo.metaTitle: El Viaje de Pepito - Free Spanish Transportation Book | Beibei Amigos
seo.metaDescription: Interactive Spanish book teaching vehicle names and transportation vocabulary. Perfect for preschoolers ages 2-5. Read-aloud audio included. Learn vehicles in Spanish with Pepito! Free from Beibei Amigos.
targetSearchTerms: how to say car in spanish

educationalStandards.grammar: Present tense, question words (¿Qué?, ¿Cuál?), descriptive adjectives (grande, rojo, azul)
educationalStandards.culturalCompetency: Urban life, transportation systems, community helpers
educationalStandards.cognitiveDevelopment: Categorization (vehicles), sound recognition, spatial awareness (above, near, in)

author: Luna 📚 - Beibei Amigos Book Generator
illustrationStyle: Colorful, child-friendly emoji illustrations with vehicles in urban settings
ctaGoal: Email capture for weekly book delivery, tour scheduling
parentNotes: This book introduces vehicles through a journey narrative, making it engaging for young learners
Encourage your child to make the vehicle sounds in Spanish (brum-brum, chu-chu, etc.)
Ask your child which vehicle is their favorite and practice saying it in Spanish
Point out vehicles during car rides and practice naming them in Spanish
The question format at the end encourages interaction and opinion expression
